assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and internet access.
No platform account, credentials, or product resources exist yet.

developer_goal: Create a Confluent Cloud account, create Kafka resources, and produce and view a first message.

first_success.outcome: A message produced to a Cloud topic is visible when consuming or viewing messages from that topic.
first_success.observable_signal: The topic message viewer shows the produced record and its value.

route_selection.surface: Confluent Cloud Console quick start: cluster, topic, and message
route_selection.rule: Prefer a hosted or direct API route over local installation, and prefer documented cURL when it reaches the same first success.
route_selection.selected: Confluent Cloud Console quick start: cluster, topic, and message

candidates.name: Confluent Cloud Console quick start: cluster, topic, and message
candidates.reason: The Cloud Console provides a hosted path to create Kafka resources, produce a message, and view it without a local Kafka installation.

candidates.name: Local Confluent CLI quick start
candidates.reason: It adds CLI installation and local credential setup while the Cloud Console supports the same first hosted message journey.

required_path.action: Create or sign in to Confluent Cloud and open the Cloud Console.
Activate the trial or add payment information if the account requires billing setup.
required_path.observable_result: The account can create Cloud resources.

required_path.action: Create or select an environment and create a basic Kafka cluster.
Create a topic in the cluster.
Use the Console producer to send a test message to the topic.
Open the topic messages view and inspect the produced record.

prerequisites.description: A payment method or trial entitlement if the account requires it.
Permission to create an environment, cluster, and topic.

external_gates.description: Some account states may require payment information before cluster creation.

unavoidable_waits.description: Cluster provisioning may take time before topic operations are available.

platform_outcomes.description: A message produced to a Cloud topic is visible when consuming or viewing messages from that topic.

excluded.reason: These occur after the first observable end-to-end result.

uncertainties.question: Trial eligibility and whether payment is required vary by account and region.
uncertainties.impact: The required path may differ for some fresh accounts.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated fresh-account walkthrough through the authenticated first-success state.
